heroTitleHighlight: real PC problems and IT support.
heroDescription: CyberSabil IT Tools is a central home for Windows troubleshooting, monitoring, cleanup, automation scripts, and standalone support utilities.
downloadDescription: Download the latest standalone Windows EXE from GitHub Releases.
safetyNote: Safety note: Download tools only from official CyberSabil GitHub links. Do not run unknown scripts or EXE files from untrusted sources.
footerText: Windows automation, IT support utilities, monitoring tools, and troubleshooting workflows.
